Sports Scene

Copied

People in attendance for the Olympic sculpture's launching ceremony in Noisy-le-Grand, France. /CMG

China Media Group (CMG) has donated a commemorative sculpture named "Rowing in the Same Boat" to the French National Olympic and Sports Committee.

The sculpture was inaugurated on Friday along with a ceremony of the "Olympic Peace Park" in the French city of Noisy-le-Grand.

China's ambassador to France, the Chief Cultural Officer of the French National Olympic Committee and the Mayor of Noisy-le-Grand attended the event and delivered speeches. The sculpture integrates cultural symbols of both China and France, symbolizing the friendship between the two sides.
